title: habenaria latilabris
intro: Habenaria latilabris is a species of orchid commonly found in tropical regions, particularly in the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Habenaria latilabris include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and grinding the leaves or roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
